scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer and the general pattern, but uses v2 when gold standard recommends v1, and doesn't cover the databag schema (name/model/port in app databag, host in unit databag) which is the focus of the gold standard answer.
scores.hallucination_notes: The agent invents specific event names (on.ready, on.revoked), event classes (IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent), and the url attribute (self._ingress.url) — none of these are confirmed by the gold standard. The gold standard explicitly notes that library Python API details are not in the charmlibs docs and only confirms the IngressPerAppRequirer class name exists.
